item.title: Create a Game
item.description: Open The Prey app and tap Create Game. Select a saved playfield or draw a new one. The playfield defines the game boundary. The app generates a join code. Share it with all participants before proceeding. Wait for players to join. They appear in the lobby list as they connect. Assign each player a role — Prey or Hunter. Every game needs at least one of each. Assign yourself a role if you are playing.

item.title: Draw a Playfield
item.description: Open The Prey app and navigate to Playfields. Tap New Playfield. The map opens centered on your current GPS position. Tap the map to place your first vertex. A pin appears. Continue tapping to place each corner of your boundary polygon. Place at least three vertices. Use pinch to zoom in and out for precision. Use drag on any vertex to reposition it. To remove a vertex, tap it. To add one on an edge, long press the edge between two vertices.

item.title: Game Creator
item.description: Your Responsibility The Game Creator sets up the game before it begins. You control the playfield, the lobby, and role assignments. Once the game starts, you play as a Hunter or Prey — the Creator role ends at launch. Four Pre-Game Steps 1. Define the Playfield Draw the boundary polygon in the app. The playfield is the GPS area within which the game is played. Keep it tight enough to be exciting, large enough to allow real hiding.

item.title: GPS Signal Lost
item.description: Check your device's status bar. A GPS icon with a slash or no icon at all means location services are off or restricted. Open your device Settings → Location and confirm location is enabled system-wide. Open Settings → Apps → The Prey → Permissions → Location and confirm it is set to Always Allow. If the app is in the background, bring it to the foreground. Some devices suspend background GPS when battery saver is active.

item.title: Hunter
item.description: Your Goal You are a Hunter. Tag every Prey before the game timer reaches zero. If all Prey are eliminated, Hunters win. Head Start — Wait It Out When the game starts, Hunters must wait. The 10-minute head start is for Prey only. Your map shows the playfield boundary but no Prey positions. Stay near the playfield. Use the time to plan your approach. Active Hunt — GPS Tracking When the head start ends, the hunt is on.

item.title: Join a Game
item.description: Get the join code from the Game Creator. It is displayed in their app on the game lobby screen. Open The Prey app on your device. Tap Join Game on the home screen. Enter the join code and tap Join. You land in the lobby. Wait for the Game Creator to assign your role. Grant location permissions when prompted. Select Always Allow. Once the Game Creator launches the game, your role screen appears.

item.title: Prey
item.description: Your Goal You are the Prey. Survive until the game timer hits zero. If at least one Prey is still untagged when time runs out, all Prey win. Head Start — 10 Minutes When the game starts, you have a 10-minute head start. Your location is not shared with Hunters during this window. Use this time to scatter and find cover. Move away from the playfield entrance. Do not stand still.

item.title: Understand Your Role Mid-Game
item.description: When the game starts, your role screen appears — Prey or Hunter. Read it. It tells you what to do next. If you are Prey: the head start countdown is on screen. Move immediately. Do not wait for hunters to appear — they start tracking as soon as the head start ends. If you are Hunter: the head start countdown is on screen too. Use the time to study the playfield boundary and plan your approach.
